template.name: Template Monitoramento Logs PIX
template.description: Monitoramento de logs PIX - v6. Calculated items com count() correto. {ITEM.LASTVALUE} exibe count real no Problems.

item.name: Log PIX - SPI-Dict-Worker Claims
item.key: logrt["D:\SPI-Dict-Worker\claims\logs\log.*\.log","(The server was not found or was not accessible|The semaphore timeout period has expired|The request was canceled due to the configured HttpClient\.Timeout of 5 seconds elapsing)"]
item.description: Captura linhas de erro nos logs: D:\SPI-Dict-Worker\claims\logs\log.*\.log

item.name: PIX Count - SPI-Dict-Worker Claims: The server was not found or was not accessible
item.params: count(/Template Monitoramento Logs PIX/logrt["D:\SPI-Dict-Worker\claims\logs\log.*\.log","(The server was not found or was not accessible|The semaphore timeout period has expired|The request was canceled due to the configured HttpClient\.Timeout of 5 seconds elapsing)"],10m,"like","The server was not found or was not accessible")
item.description: Contagem do erro nos ultimos 10min: The server was not found or was not accessible

trigger.name: PIX Log - SPI-Dict-Worker Claims: The server was not found or was not accessible
trigger.event_name: PIX Log - SPI-Dict-Worker Claims: The server was not found or was not accessible (Count: {ITEM.LASTVALUE})
trigger.description: Erro nos logs de SPI-Dict-Worker Claims. Mensagem: The server was not found or was not accessible O campo Count mostra ocorrencias dos ultimos 10 minutos.
